untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) 12+ month lookback momentum calculation not available as single indicator; (2) volume percentile thresholds (40th, 50th, 75th) require dynamic percentile computation not in allowed indicator set; (3) regime-specific weighting logic (3-12 months vs 3+ years holding period) cannot be expressed as static entry/exit rules; (4) negative momentum constraint with volume interaction requires multi-condition lookback logic beyond available operators
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using returns (12-month proxy) and vol_ratio_20 as volume deviation metric. However, the core signal's value proposition—differential volume weighting by holding period horizon—cannot be properly captured in a single backtest rule set. This signal requires either: custom indicator for rolling 12/36-month momentum, percentile-rank functions, or regime-conditional rule switching not supported by the engine.
